DP.283.0009:
Congratulations on your winning
streak, challenger!\f
The Tower Tycoon has sent word
that he is impressed with you.\f
He recognizes your skill, and he’d
like to challenge you to a battle!\f
Are you ready to battle the Tower
Tycoon?
DP.283.0010:
Hi!
My name’s Palmer.\f
I remember you from when you were
in Twinleaf, [0103,0000].\f
You were always playing with my son
[0103,0001], right?\f
You’ve grown up since then, and
most impressively, too!\f
So, I’d like you to show me.\f
Show me the bond you’ve built
with your Pokémon.\f
Show me the skill you’ve acquired
as a Trainer!\f
DP.283.0011:
Palmer: So, you’ve come this far!\f
As the Tower Tycoon, I’ll have to
give you my best effort.\f
That’s how the best Trainers show
respect to each other.\f
By battling all out as dedicated
students of Pokémon!\f
DP.283.0012:
Bravo!\f
One day, I imagine my son will come
challenge me just as you have.\f
That’s something I look forward
to a great deal.\f
You will become even more skilled,
the very same way your father did.\f
Keep battling Trainers from around
the world and keep growing greater\r
in stature!\f
DP.283.0013:
Bravo!
I feel inspired in my heart!\f
It brings back a memory of that day
long ago...\f
I went out to the lake with your
father that day...\f
We were attacked by a wild Pokémon.\f
We fended it off, but I don’t recall 
how. It was that desperate.\f
That was my first step as
a Trainer.\f
I wonder if the professor is doing
well?\f
...That’s enough reminiscing.\f
My young friend, the world and
your future hold infinite promise.\f
Go on, you can be all that you
desire!\f
There is no limit to where you
can go!\f
